platinum.title: Platinum Protection

platinum.discreetActive: Silent alert — essential in visible danger situations.
platinum.savedOnAccount: These settings are saved to your account and restored on each login.

proSettings.title: PRO Settings
proSettings.discreetDesc: Discreet vibrations to confirm each SOS step
proSettings.proSosDesc: In PRO mode, manual SOS is sent simultaneously to both numbers.
proSettings.discreetSteps: Steps: GPS → vibration · SMS sent → vibration · Recording → vibration · Follow-up SMS → vibration

errors.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.codesMustDiffer: Normal and duress codes must be different.

settings.notificationsDenied: Notifications blocked in browser settings. Allow them manually.
settings.gpsStandbyDesc: Updates every 5 minutes to save battery.
settings.gpsAlertDesc: High precision every 10 seconds during active alert.
settings.dataDisclaimer: Your data is stored locally. Vigilink-SOS only transmits your data during an active alert.

upgrade.title: Choose a plan
upgrade.chooseProtectionDesc: From basic SOS to family surveillance.
upgrade.paymentConfirmedDesc: Your subscription is active. All features are unlocked.
upgrade.paymentCancelledDesc: No amount was charged. You can try again at any time.
upgrade.noConnection: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
upgrade.testModeDesc: No Stripe backend required. Click on a plan to simulate a successful payment.
upgrade.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will lose access to paid features.
upgrade.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled — You are now on the Free plan.
upgrade.downgradeToProDesc: You will keep PRO features but lose Platinum features (fall detection, shake, discreet mode, sponsorship).
upgrade.manageSubscriptionDesc: You can change or cancel your subscription at any time.
upgrade.proTrialInfo: PRO: 24h free trial, then $9.99 CAD/month. Card registered now, not charged until trial ends. Platinum: $19.99 CAD/month. Cancel anytime.
upgrade.restoreNotFound: No purchase found for this account. If you paid recently, please contact support.
upgrade.stripeDisclaimer: Stripe, Inc. — Vigilink-SOS does not store any banking data.

legal.title: Terms of Use
legal.acceptRequired: Your acceptance is required to continue.
legal.disclaimerWarrantyText: The "Vigilink-SOS" application is a technological assistance tool. It does not guarantee in any case the intervention of emergency services (Police, Ambulance, Fire) or the absolute safety of the user.
legal.disclaimerFailureText: the company cannot be held responsible in case of:
legal.disclaimerNoGps: No GPS signal or mobile network (dead zones or basements).
legal.disclaimerWarning: Vigilink-SOS is a technological assistance tool and does not guarantee the intervention of emergency services. In case of emergency, always call 911.
legal.privacyGeoText: The user agrees that their position is collected and transmitted only when triggering an alert or activating the Dead Man's Switch timer.
legal.privacyAudioText: Recordings captured during an alert are encrypted and stored only to serve as evidence for the user. Retention period: 30 days.
legal.privacyShareText: No data is sold to third parties. Data is only transmitted to the emergency contacts chosen by the user.
legal.privacyComplianceText: This application complies with the Act to modernize legislative provisions regarding the protection of personal information (Law 25, Quebec, Canada). Date of acceptance and anonymized identifier are kept as proof of consent.
legal.userRespFalseAlertText: The user is responsible for the consequences of a false alert deliberately triggered, including potential costs incurred by emergency services intervention.
legal.userRespMaintenanceText: The user must ensure proper functioning.
legal.userRespTestText: It is recommended to test the system every month to ensure it works properly before actually needing it.
legal.userRespDuressText: The user understands that entering the duress code (Code B) triggers a silent alert sent to their contacts, even if the interface displays "System deactivated".
legal.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the terms of use and I understand that Vigilink-SOS is an assistance tool and not an official emergency service. I understand that I must call 911 in case of immediate danger.
legal.autoConsent: I authorize Vigilink-SOS to automatically activate GPS and audio recording (30 seconds) when my alert word is detected, without additional confirmation. This action will also trigger the automatic sending of the SOS to my emergency contacts.
legal.complianceNote: Your acceptance is timestamped and kept in accordance with Quebec Law 25. Anonymized identifier — no personal data transmitted.

sponsor.title: Sponsorship
sponsor.platinumDesc: Protect your loved ones with your Platinum plan.
sponsor.platinumOnlyDesc: Upgrade to Platinum to invite your loved ones and offer them your protection.
sponsor.smsAppHint: The SMS app will open with a pre-filled message
sponsor.desktopHint: Choose SMS, WhatsApp or copy the text
sponsor.phoneError: Enter a valid phone number with country code.
sponsor.otpInfo: A 6-digit OTP code valid for 15 min will be generated. The guest gets the PRO plan.
sponsor.qrHint: The guest can scan this QR code to activate their invitation directly.
sponsor.receivedCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your sponsor. You'll instantly get all Platinum protections.
sponsor.codeInvalid: Invalid, expired, or already used code. Ask your sponsor for a new one.
sponsor.linkActivated: Link activated! {{name}} is now your primary emergency contact.
sponsor.smsInvitedBy: {{name}} has invited you to activate Vigilink-SOS protection.
sponsor.smsLinkNote: (The link opens the app and fills in your number + code automatically)
sponsor.smsHelpNote: If you have any issues, contact {{name}} for a new code.
sponsor.logoutWarning: If the guest logs out, they will need a new code
sponsor.receivedCodeDescPro: Enter the 6-digit code from your sponsor. You will instantly get all PRO features.
sponsor.smsFailed: SMS sending failed. You can copy the message and send it manually.

permissions.title: Permission required
permissions.description: Vigilink-SOS needs your permission to work properly.
permissions.microphoneDesc: Allows voice detection of alert words and emergency audio recording.
permissions.gpsDesc: Allows including your GPS position in alerts sent to your contacts.
permissions.notificationDesc: Allows receiving alerts and confirmations even when the app is in the background.

pwa.installDesc: Add Vigilink-SOS to your home screen for quick access

journal.title: Security Journal
journal.empty: No entries yet. Start documenting incidents.
journal.proOnly: A PRO or Platinum subscription is required to access this feature.

meeting.title: Meeting Mode
meeting.description: Record details about someone you are meeting. This info will be sent to your contacts if you trigger an SOS alert.
meeting.proOnly: A PRO or Platinum subscription is required to access Meeting Mode.

travel.title: Travel Mode
travel.description: Set check-in times during your trip. If you miss a check-in, your contacts will be alerted.
travel.proOnly: A PRO or Platinum subscription is required to access Travel Mode.

medical.title: Medical Profile
medical.proOnly: A PRO or Platinum subscription is required to access Medical Profile.

qrcode.title: Emergency QR Code
qrcode.description: This QR code contains your emergency information. Print it or save it to your phone case.
qrcode.noData: Complete your profile to generate a QR code
qrcode.proOnly: A PRO or Platinum subscription is required to access QR Code.
qrcode.scanInfo: Scan this code to see emergency info

alzheimerSponsor.title: Alzheimer Sponsorship
alzheimerSponsor.subtitle: Manage people under your protection
alzheimerSponsor.name: Full name
alzheimerSponsor.instructions: Instructions for the person who finds them
alzheimerSponsor.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: This person lives at 123 Main St. Call the caregiver immediately. Do not leave them alone.
alzheimerSponsor.emergencyNotesPlaceholder: Other important info for first responders
alzheimerSponsor.qrInfo: This QR code is unique. Print it and place it on a bracelet, badge, or wallet.
alzheimerSponsor.proOnly: A Platinum subscription is required for Alzheimer sponsorship.
alzheimerSponsor.inviteDesc: Send an OTP code via SMS so a loved one can access the Alzheimer profile.
alzheimerSponsor.invitePhone: Phone of the caregiver to invite
alzheimerSponsor.noPersonsDesc: Add an Alzheimer's patient to manage their QR code remotely and leave instructions for anyone who finds them.
alzheimerSponsor.profileInfo: The QR code will show a simplified page: call caregiver button, GPS location, and your custom instructions.

swipe.sponsorDesc: The sponsorship system lets you invite your loved ones to enjoy Pro or Platinum benefits for free. Generate a unique code, share it, and your guest activates their benefits in seconds. Swipe left or right to navigate between sections.
swipe.alzheimerDesc: Alzheimer mode lets you create profiles for people with cognitive disorders. Each profile generates a unique QR code the person carries. If found, anyone can scan the code to see instructions, call the caregiver, and share the GPS location.
swipe.navHint: Swipe left or right to navigate between Sponsorship, Home, and Alzheimer.
